title: BootProofRecord
description: An immutable record proving the integrity and outcome of an NLBoot boot execution, linking the boot plan, per-stage evidence, and attestation refs.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

bootPlanRef.description: URN reference to the NLBootPlan that was executed.

deviceRef.description: URN reference to the physical device or asset on which the boot occurred.

outcome.description: Overall outcome of the boot execution.

bootedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the boot was initiated.

stageProofs.description: Per-stage proof items recording the artifact executed and verification verdict for each stage.

stageName.description: Name of the boot stage, matching the stage name in the referenced NLBootPlan.

artifactRef.description: URN reference to the artifact that was loaded for this stage.

contentHash.description: Actual content digest observed at execution time, e.g. "sha256:...".

notes.description: Optional diagnostic notes for this stage.

evidenceRefs.description: URN references to AttestationEvidence objects captured during this boot.

policyDecisionRef.description: Optional URN reference to the PolicyDecision that authorized this boot.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over the serialized proof record.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this boot proof.
